title: Polish fish visual style
description: Refine fish aesthetics only: prompt presentation, right prompt styling, and shell color palette, without changing core workflow semantics.
close_reason: Applied fish visual polish to prompt, right prompt, and color palette.

title: Add fzf and zoxide to fish
description: Install fzf and zoxide, add them to the reproducible package list, and wire their fish integration into the main shell setup.
close_reason: Added reproducible fzf and zoxide integration to dotfiles; local apt install remains blocked by sudo password on this machine.

title: Improve fish daily workflow
description: Enhance fish as the main interactive shell with general usability improvements such as navigation helpers, shell ergonomics, and lightweight prompt polish, without Beads-specific shell UX.
close_reason: Implemented general fish ergonomics improvements and documented the new helpers.

title: Route Super+Enter to fish
description: Move the GNOME Super+Enter terminal shortcut from the default terminal binding to a reproducible custom keybinding that launches gnome-terminal running fish.
close_reason: Moved Super+Enter to a custom GNOME fish launcher and disabled the default terminal binding.

title: Add GNOME shortcut to launch fish
description: Add a reproducible GNOME custom keybinding so Ctrl+Enter opens gnome-terminal running fish, without changing the default login shell.
close_reason: Added reproducible GNOME custom shortcut for launching fish with Ctrl+Enter.

title: Refine fish prompt style
description: Tune the visual style of the fish shell prompt only, keeping the shell minimal and repo-agnostic.

title: Clean fish startup and general ergonomics
description: Restructure fish startup files, keep conda/nvm/PATH robust, and add only general shell ergonomics that do not depend on Beads-specific shortcuts.
close_reason: Implemented in fish tuning change set.

title: Remove Beads-specific shell UX and update docs
description: Remove bd-specific abbreviations from fish and revise repo documentation so Beads is treated as a development process tool, not a shell UX feature.
close_reason: Implemented in fish tuning change set.

title: Implement minimal fish prompt
description: Add a fast fish prompt with cwd, exit status, and lightweight git context, without any Beads-specific prompt elements.
close_reason: Implemented in fish tuning change set.

title: Tune fish shell workflow
description: Refine prompt, completions, aliases/abbrs, and terminal ergonomics now that fish is installed and managed through dotfiles.
close_reason: Implemented the narrowed fish-only tuning scope; Ghostty follow-up is tracked separately in dotfiles-bjx.

title: Tune Ghostty terminal ergonomics
description: Follow up on terminal-side tuning after the fish shell work. Cover visual density, padding, opacity, and other Ghostty-specific ergonomics separately from shell behavior.
